title: NABCONS Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) Junior Level Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of NABCONS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NABCONS Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 24 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from any Recognized University (Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, Veterinary and Animal Science only)
qualification.details: Graduate from any Recognized University (Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, Veterinary and Animal Science only).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABCONS Junior Level Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Level Consultant position is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from any recognized university, specifically in fields like Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, or Veterinary and Animal Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Level Consultant role?
faq.answer: The age limit for this position is between a minimum of 24 years and a maximum of 50 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Level Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Level Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Level Consultant position in NABCONS through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Level Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Level Consultant position is on a contract basis, as per the official notification released by NABCONS.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official NABCONS website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mizoram. Specific details about the project location might be available in the official notification.
